title: Turku Cold Snap
lead: Turku is experiencing a severe cold snap with a Z-Score of -3.06. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Turku are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 11.7 GG, indicating a high demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 57%, and the wind speed is moderate at 10.4 km/h. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with no Cooling Degree Days (CDD) reported, emphasizing the severity of the cold weather.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety and infrastructure integrity.
